title: Require structured api.json on package publish

source.subject: Require structured api.json on publish and improve package docs UX.

body:
## Outcome

Require structured api.json on publish and improve package docs UX.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
- Structured **api.json** is the hierarchical contract for package docs (types, members, **typeRef** links)—not parallel string-key tables outside the schema.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`b8e1500`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/b8e1500) — Require structured api.json on publish and improve package docs UX.
